Justification: The motor shall maintain a minimum speed of 15,000 RPM under typical blending load (defined by the standard test mix) to ensure effective processing of ingredients, including frozen fruits and ice.; The blending efficiency will be assessed by achieving a smooth consistency (defined as <5% of particles larger than 2mm) within 45 seconds when blending a standard mix of 100g cubed, frozen solid banana, 50g fresh, packed spinach, and 200ml water at high speed.; The blender shall offer at least two variable speed settings (low: 10,000-15,000 RPM, high: 15,000-20,000 RPM). The pulse function shall activate at high speed for a duration of 1 second per button press, providing short, powerful bursts.; The blending jar shall be designed to minimize ingredient adherence, with a maximum allowable percentage of ingredients (by weight) remaining on the jar walls after a standard blend cycle of 5%.

The total weight of the blender, including the battery, shall not exceed 1 kg, with a focus on balanced weight distribution for comfortable carrying.; The blender shall have a maximum overall height of 250mm and a base footprint diameter of at least 80mm to ensure compatibility with common storage solutions.; The stability of the base shall be tested on a smooth, flat countertop, resisting tipping when subjected to a lateral force of 5N applied at a height of 100mm from the surface.; An integrated carrying handle or strap shall be incorporated, featuring an ergonomic shape and a non-slip grip surface for comfortable and secure transport.

The rechargeable Li-ion battery shall provide a minimum of 12 full blending cycles (defined as 30 seconds blending at high speed with the standard test mix) on a single charge.; Charging shall be via USB-C, supporting USB Power Delivery (USB PD) up to 30W, achieving a full charge from 0% to 100% in under 2 hours when using a compatible 30W PD charger.; A multi-stage LED indicator shall display battery status: Green (75-100%), Yellow (25-75%), Red (0-25%), and flashing Red when charging is required.; The battery management system shall include overcharge, over-discharge, short-circuit, and over-current protection. The nominal battery capacity shall be approximately 2500-3000 mAh.

The Tritan blending jar shall withstand a drop from 1 meter onto a concrete surface without cracking or shattering, when tested empty or filled with water.; The ABS plastic motor housing shall exhibit a minimum Izod impact strength of 20 kJ/m² at room temperature.; The blade assembly shall be constructed from SUS420 stainless steel with a minimum Rockwell hardness of HRC 50 to ensure wear resistance and longevity.; All food-contact materials shall be certified food-grade and achieve a Gray Scale rating of no more than 2 for color change after 24-hour exposure to turmeric and coffee solutions, followed by standard cleaning procedures.

The blending jar, lid, and blade assembly shall be top-rack dishwasher safe, maintaining material clarity, color, and functionality after a minimum of 50 dishwasher cycles.; The motor base shall achieve an Ingress Protection (IP) rating of IPX4, protecting against splashing water from any direction.; The blade assembly shall be detachable from the jar using a tool-less mechanism, requiring no more than 5 seconds for removal and reattachment.

A safety interlock mechanism shall prevent motor activation unless the blending jar is correctly and securely attached to the motor base. Accidental disengagement shall require a minimum torque of 0.5 Nm.; The blade assembly shall be fully enclosed within the blending jar when the lid is secured, preventing accidental contact during operation and handling.; The motor shall incorporate thermal overload protection, automatically shutting off if internal temperatures exceed 100°C, requiring a 15-minute cool-down period before re-operation.

The ABS plastic housing shall incorporate a minimum of 30% post-consumer recycled content, without compromising impact strength or safety requirements.; The battery shall be rated for a minimum of 500 full charge-discharge cycles before capacity degrades below 80%. The battery compartment shall be designed for user-replaceable access using a single Phillips head screw.; Standby power consumption shall be less than 0.1W, and energy consumed per blending cycle shall be less than 15 Wh.; The product shall be designed for disassembly, utilizing no more than 5 unique fastener types and allowing for disassembly in under 5 minutes for recycling.

The design shall be clean, minimalist, and modern, offered in a palette of 3-4 sophisticated color options (e.g., matte black, slate gray, rose gold).; The blending jar shall have a maximum grip diameter of 75mm and the lid a diameter of 80mm, both featuring a textured, non-slip surface for secure handling.; A single, multi-function button shall control operation: short press for pulse (1-second burst at high speed), long press for continuous blending.

The blending jar shall have a total volume of 550ml, with a maximum usable blending capacity of 500ml.; Volume markings shall be embossed on the exterior of the jar at 50ml intervals, with an accuracy tolerance of +/- 5ml.

The operational noise level shall not exceed 75 dB(A) when measured at a distance of 1 meter from the unit during a standard blending cycle.; Vibration dampening measures shall be integrated into the motor housing to minimize perceived noise and vibration.

The blending time target is 30-60 seconds for the standard test mix (100g cubed frozen banana, 50g fresh spinach, 10g chia seeds, 200ml almond milk).; Ice crushing capability: 5 standard ice cubes (approx. 20g each) with 50ml water blended for 30 seconds, resulting in uniformly crushed ice particles with no whole cubes remaining.; Charging time: Under 2 hours from 0% to 100% using a USB PD 30W charger.

Target ex-factory cost: $35 USD. Target retail price range: $50 - $100 USD.; Key component cost targets: Motor Assembly (<$10), Battery Pack (<$8), Housing & Jar (<$7), Electronics & PCB (<$5), Blades & Seals (<$3), Packaging (<$2). Cost targets must not compromise performance, durability, or safety requirements.

The battery shall be user-replaceable using a single Phillips head screwdriver, with detailed instructions provided in the user manual and online.; Consumable parts (blade assembly, sealing gasket) shall be user-replaceable and available for purchase. The blade assembly shall be rated for a minimum lifespan of 500 blending cycles.; A comprehensive user manual shall detail cleaning, maintenance, and troubleshooting, with links to online support resources.
